message:
refactor(nats): simplify timeout handling and use struct init syntax

Minor cleanup to the NATS client:

- read_more_until(): Replace match/Ok/Err with unwrap_or_else for
  more idiomatic error mapping on the timeout result.
- cleanup_request_subscription(): Suppress the tracing::warn for now
  (prefixed vars with underscore) — the logging infrastructure for
  NATS cleanup is not yet finalized.
- Test config initialization switched from field-by-field mutation to
  struct init with ..Default::default(), which is more idiomatic and
  makes the test intent clearer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
